
# Project Documentation Sync Rules

## What counts as behavior change
- Threshold updates
- Decision order changes
- New model/fallback methods
- New or changed status/issue mapping
- Runtime path changes that affect confidence or notes

## Required documentation updates
- Detection methods
- Decision workflow and priority
- Thresholds and vote conditions
- Inputs/outputs and taxonomy mapping
- Performance/operational notes when relevant
- Example notes/logs if message format changes
